# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the affected flow.
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` in `apps/mobile`.
- [ ] I ran `npx tsc --noEmit` in `apps/mobile`.
- [ ] I ran `npm run build:web` when web behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior, privacy, Supabase, Vercel, GPS, invite links or store/legal text changed.
- [ ] I did not include secrets, real GPS coordinates or personal data.

## Screenshots or Evidence

Add screenshots, logs or test notes when relevant.

## Risk

Call out any remaining risk, manual test gap or follow-up.
